name: TableColumnComponent
description:
The component that represents a table column.
```html
<fdp-column
 name="name"
 key="name"
 label="Name"
 align="start">
</fdp-column>

<fdp-column
 name="price"
 key="price.value">
 <fdp-table-header *fdpHeaderCellDef>Price</fdp-table-header>
 <fdp-table-cell *fdpCellDef="let item">
  {{item.price.value}} {{item.price.currency}}
 </fdp-table-cell>
</fdp-column>
```

inputs.name: announceEmptyCell
inputs.description: Whether to announce empty cells to screen readers. Default is true.

inputs.name: applyText
inputs.description: Whether to apply fd-table-text (text-shadow) to the cell content, if disabled noWrap has no effect.

inputs.name: dataType
inputs.description: Data type the column represents. Default is 'string'

inputs.name: endFreezable
inputs.description: Toggles freeze feature for the column.

inputs.name: filterSelectOptions
inputs.description:
Optional array of available filter options.
Providing values to this input will cause the filter to change from a text-type input to a select-type input.

inputs.name: filterable
inputs.description: Toggles filter feature for the column.

inputs.name: footerCellTemplate
inputs.description: Column footer cell template, to be used when the footer cell requires more complex content than only text.

inputs.name: footerLabel
inputs.description: Column footer label, to be used when the footer contains only text.

inputs.name: freezable
inputs.description: Toggles freeze feature for the column.

inputs.name: groupable
inputs.description: Toggles grouping feature for the column.

inputs.name: noWrap
inputs.description: Whether the text should wrap, when text is too long for 1 line

inputs.name: nonInteractive
inputs.description: Whether the table cell inside table header should be non-interactive.

inputs.name: sortable
inputs.description: Toggles sort feature for the column.

inputs.name: visible
inputs.description: Initial visibility state of the column. Default `true`.
